projects.name: RabbitMQ Management UI
projects.arguments: -NoLogo -NoProfile -Command "$svc = Get-Service RabbitMQ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not $svc) { Write-Host 'RabbitMQ service NOT installed.' -ForegroundColor Red; exit 1 }; if ($svc.Status -ne 'Running') { Write-Host ('RabbitMQ status: ' + $svc.Status + ' (debería ser Running).') -ForegroundColor Red; exit 1 }; Write-Host 'RabbitMQ Running. Management UI: http://localhost:15672 (guest/guest)' -ForegroundColor Green; while ($true) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 3600 }"
